(001) Website Development Website development refers to the tasks associated with creating, building, and maintaining websites.. (002) UI/UX Design A UI/UX design brief is a document that spells out the main needs, aims, and hopes for creating a mobile app's user interface (UI) and user experience (UX).. (003) Web Design A web designer creates the visual and functional elements of a website, focusing on layout, aesthetics, and user experience.. (004) Data Analytics The process of inspecting, cleaning, transforming, and modeling data to discover useful information, identify patterns, and support decision-making.. (005) Digital Marketing Using digital channels like social media, search engines, and email to promote products and services and connect with customers.. (006) AI/ML Integration Seamless AI and machine learning integration for predictive analytics, personalization, and intelligent automation in apps and platforms.. (008) Workflow Automation n8n-powered automation for streamlining operations, API orchestration, and no-code business process optimization..
